headline: Sterling's Chip Manufacturing Bet Takes Shape: Can It Pay Off?
summary: STRL's CEC acquisition broadens its semiconductor capabilities as its first fab campus tests the strategy's growth potential.

headline: Quanta Services Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release & Webcast Schedule
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that it will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, July 30, 2026, before the market opens. In conjunction with the press release, Quanta has scheduled a webcast and conference call for 9:00 a.m. Eastern time on Thursday, July 30, 2026.

headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Is Chasing AI Data Centers To Build Its Next Growth Engine
summary: Quanta Services (NYSE:PWR) is increasing its focus on technology-related revenues tied to AI-driven data centers and advanced manufacturing projects. The company is committing capital to power transformer manufacturing and offsite facilities to support these technology infrastructure opportunities. Management has highlighted a record project backlog and a stronger emphasis on technology work as key parts of this shift. Quanta Services has long been known for its utility and grid-related...

headline: Quanta Services (PWR) Joins Large Cap Growth Indexes, Is The Upside Already Priced In?
summary: Quanta Services index reshuffle: what changed Quanta Services (PWR) has just gone through a broad reshuffle across several Russell benchmarks, dropping from multiple value and midcap indexes while being added to large cap growth and defensive indexes. These index changes alter how Quanta Services features in rules based portfolios that track Russell benchmarks, which can affect ownership mix and trading volumes around the rebalancing date.
